name: Eggplant Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 large eggplant, peeled and cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the eggplant pieces in oil with minced garlic until very soft, about 30 minutes.
2. Stir in bread crumbs until moistened.
3. Sprinkle with basil and add grated cheese, pepper, and parsley.
4. Fill parboiled peppers halfway with the eggplant mixture.
5. Place a slice of mozzarella in each center.
6. Cover with more of the eggplant mixture.
7. Place in a baking pan with 1/2 cup water.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
9. Sprinkle top with fresh Romano and Parmesan cheeses.
10. Top with Mama's Marinara Sauce.
